TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kazangiljan, title = Kazangiljan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kazangiljan} }

S.FORM: alang Kazangiljan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 294 buwan, 1,052 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,015 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 37 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kazangiljan hya' ga Wakaba. tay mkyahu' na Kazangiljan hya' ga Payuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kazangiljan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 294 buwan, 1,052 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 1,015 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 37 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kazangiljan hya' ga Wakaba. tay mkyahu' na Kazangiljan hya' ga Payuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kazaŋiljan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kazaŋiljan ħjaʔ ɣa wakaβa. taj mkjaħuʔ na kazaŋiljan ħjaʔ ɣa pajuwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
